channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Broken System That Keeps Shipping Crews Stranded in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Vessels are increasingly being abandoned during the war on Iran, revealing a hidden failure in the global systems that keep goods—and people—moving.

item.title: NASA Rover Finds Glowing, Ruby-Like Crystals on Mars for the First Time
item.description: The tiny grains are embedded inside pebbles found outside the rim of Jezero Crater.

item.title: Le forfait mobile de Free repasse à 9,99 euros : c’est le bon moment pour faire baisser la facture mensuelle
item.description: Le prix de la Série Free a tendance à fluctuer au fil des semaines. Actuellement positionnée à moins de 10 euros pour une généreuse enveloppe de 150 Go, l'offre retrouve un très bon équilibre et se présente comme une option particulièrement pertinente.

item.title: You can finally replace your embarrassing Gmail username
item.description: If you've been stuck with a regrettable Gmail username you picked years ago, you might finally have a way out. Starting Tuesday, Gmail users in the US can change the portion of their email address before "@gmail.com," as reported by Android Authority. After changing your Gmail username, your old email address will remain connected to […]

item.title: Quel est le meilleur forfait mobile pour voyager dans le monde en 2026 ?
item.description: Partir en voyage sans exploser sa facture de téléphone, c'est désormais possible. Les forfaits mobiles internationaux se multiplient avec des tarifs de 15,99 à 44,99 euros et des couvertures de 110 à 130 destinations. On a comparé Sosh, Free, Bouygues, RED et Orange. On vous parle aussi des offres eSIM internationales.

item.title: Samsung dévoile les tarifs de ses téléviseurs OLED et Micro RGB pour 2026.
item.description: Les prix des séries S85H, S92H (ou S90H), S95H, S99H, R85H et R95H viennent d'être communiqués, avec des modèles adaptés à diverses tailles d'écran. En voici tous les détails.

item.title: Waymo starts robotaxi services at San Antonio International Airport
item.description: It's the fourth airport Waymo is serving, adding to Phoenix Sky Harbor, San Francisco, and San Jose International airports.

item.title: Android 17 : le dossier ultime pour tout savoir sur la future mise à jour de vos smartphones et tablettes
item.description: Les chantiers d'Android 17 ont été officiellement lancés par Google. Voici les nouveautés, les dates importantes et les smartphones compatibles avec la mise à jour encore en bêta.

item.title: Speechify’s Windows app uses local models for transcription and dictation
item.description: Speechify just launched a native Windows app that employs locally stored models to enable dictation and transcription across apps.

item.title: Nvidia déploie enfin la meilleure fonctionnalité du DLSS 4.5, mais vous ne pourrez peut-être pas en profiter
item.description: Après une annonce en janvier dernier lors du CES, Nvidia déploie enfin la Dynamic Multi-Frame Generation pour ses GeForce RTX 50. Une mise à jour qui simplifie grandement l'utilisation de la technologie pour les joueurs.

item.title: Une tempête solaire fonce vers la Terre… Artemis II menacé au dernier moment ?
item.description: Plus de 53 ans que ce n’est pas arrivé. Des astronautes s’apprêtent à prendre la direction de la Lune. L’excitation est à son comble. Une éruption solaire viendra-t-elle tout gâcher ?

item.title: NVIDIA's DLSS 4.5 Multi Frame Generation tech is now available to boost your Hz
item.description: After releasing DLSS 4.5's Super Resolution feature earlier this year, NVIDIA has released an update with DLSS 4.5 features designed to boost frame rates on RTX 50 series cards. Those include DLSS 4.5 Dynamic Multi Frame Generation and DLSS 4.5 Multi Frame Generation 6X. With those, NVIDIA is promising the "smoothest path-traced gaming yet" to unlock the potential for high-refresh 4K 240Hz OLED gaming displays, or 1080p and 1440p monitors at 360Hz and beyond. The first feature, DLSS 4.5 Dynamic Multi Frame Generation, is like an "automatic transmission" for your RTX 50 series card, NVIDIA sai...

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs aspirateurs balais en 2026 ?
item.description: Les aspirateurs-balais laveurs combinent aspiration et lavage à l'eau des sols - parfois appuyé par de la vapeur ou du détergent. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs modèles d'aspirateurs-balais laveurs.

item.title: The New ‘Masters of the Universe’ Trailer Brings Eternia to Life
item.description: Nicholas Galitzine and Camila Mendes lead a star-studded cast in the fantasy adventure epic, opening in theaters June 5.

item.title: AirPods Max 2 Review: Still Ridiculously Expensive and Ridiculously Nice
item.description: The AirPods Max 2 might feel familiar, but they take two of the most important things about wireless headphones and knock them out of the park.

item.title: NVIDIA lance enfin son DLSS 4.5 avec le mode 6X : comment booster votre carte graphique RTX
item.description: Annoncée en grande pompe lors du CES 2026 en janvier dernier, l'ambitieuse mise à jour de NVIDIA est enfin disponible. Le constructeur déploie aujourd'hui la version bêta de sa nouvelle application intégrant l'intégralité des fonctionnalités du DLSS 4.5. Au programme, une fluidité inédite grâce à la génération dynamique d'images et un mode 6X réservé aux possesseurs de cartes GeForce RTX 50....

item.title: AI Has Flooded All the Weather Apps
item.description: Weather forecasting has gotten a big boost from machine learning. How that translates into what users see can vary.

item.title: The AirPods Max 2 are a great sequel, but not an ambitious one
item.description: It's been over five years since the original AirPods Max came out. A minor hardware update in 2024 brought new colors and changed the Lightning port to USB-C (to meet EU regulations), and an update last year added lossless audio and ultra-low latency. But a new version was still well overdue. The $549 AirPods Max […]

item.title: Nvidia rolls out DLSS 4.5 update with new frame generation features
item.description: Nvidia has launched the next major update for its Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) feature, introducing AI-powered frame generation modes for supported GeForce RTX graphics cards. These DLSS 4.5 upgrades are included in the new Nvidia app beta update starting today, allowing players to improve performance and image quality across more than 20 gaming titles. […]...

item.title: You can order Grubhub and Uber Eats ‘conversationally’ with Alexa Plus
item.description: Amazon is giving you a new way to order food through Grubhub and Uber Eats with Alexa without having to endure an awkward exchange just to add fries. Amazon said the entire process is meant to be conversational, building your order in a similar manner to ordering in a restaurant. That means changing your order, […]

item.title: Samsung finally brings blood pressure tracking to US Galaxy Watches
item.description: Samsung is starting to roll out blood pressure tracking to its smartwatch users in the US, after several years of the feature being available elsewhere. The update is available on Galaxy Watch 4 models or later running at least WatchOS 4.0, and enables users to monitor their heart rate alongside systolic and diastolic blood pressure. […]

item.title: With its new app store, Ring bets on AI to go beyond home security
item.description: Ring's app store will allow the company to target broader use cases beyond security, like elder care or business needs.

item.title: The latest Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses are more customizable and expensive
item.description: The latest iteration of Meta's smart glasses has arrived and, as rumored, they are more customizable, particularly for people who need prescription lenses. Meta and Ray-Ban parent company EssilorLuxottica revealed two new styles of frames: the Ray-Ban Meta Blayzer Optics and Scriber Optics, which will start at $499 a pair. The latest glasses are still considered to be part of the "Gen 2" Ray-Ban Meta glasses, but they do come with a few upgrades that make it easier to get a personalized fit. According to EssilorLuxottica, both styles have somewhat slimmer frames, swappable nosepads and adjust...

item.title: The RAM crisis is Apple's best chance in decades to capture the PC market
item.description: In the current RAM crisis, no company is better positioned to not only weather the storm but turn it to its advantage like Apple. It proved that when it released the MacBook Neo in early March. Despite only including 8GB of RAM, the Neo doesn't feel compromised, a testament to the company's silicon and software engineering. For Apple, it may be tempting to treat its latest MacBook as a one-off. That would be a mistake, because at this moment, the business decisions that made the Neo possible represent a once-in-a-generation opportunity to become a bigger player in the PC market. If you read En...

item.title: Apple AirPods Max 2 review: Better late than never
item.description: I’m honestly shocked the AirPods Max 2 even exists. After Apple only added a USB-C port and a few new colors to its over-ear headphones in 2024, I thought it had given up on delivering a proper upgrade to its priciest AirPods model. I’m happy to report that wasn’t the case. The AirPods Max 2 is certainly an updated version of Apple’s headphones, but the company is also catching it up to the AirPods Pro 3. The headphones now carry the company’s powerful H2 audio chip, the component that enables features like Adaptive Audio and Live Translation. The USB-C AirPods Max may have barely been an up...

item.title: Amazon adds dynamic food delivery ordering to Alexa+
item.description: Amazon announced that it is adding new capabilities for ordering food delivery with its Alexa+ artificial intelligence assistant. Users will be able to place orders using natural language on Alexa+ through the GrubHub or Uber Eats platforms, provided they have an Amazon device with a large screen. First, you'll need to connect an account for those delivery services to use the feature. You can ask to see restaurants with a specific cuisine or tell the assistant to go right to a favorite spot. Once you start an order, Alexa+ will also support natural language requests and, if you ask for somethi...

item.title: Google is now letting users in the US change their Gmail address
item.description: Users will be able to change their username only once every 12 months. Plus, they won't be able to delete their new email address for that period of time.

item.title: The Shark BlastBoss is a leaf blower that can be used indoors
item.description: Shark just introduced a new product called the BlastBoss that's basically a leaf blower rated for both indoor and outdoor use. This means it can actually be used to blow leaves around in the yard, but is also handy for tidying up debris in the house. It offers adjustable airflow up to 190 mph, making it a "versatile solution for the garage, patio, car, inside the home and beyond." I imagine this would also make it the bane of every dog and cat in the neighborhood. It's pretty light, at under 1.5 pounds, and cordless. The BlastBoss ships with several attachments, including an extension wand and...

item.title: Shark’s BlastBoss amplifies your sweeping with a 190 mph blast of air
item.description: SharkNinja has announced a new cleaning tool called the BlastBoss. It looks like a handheld vacuum but functions like a leaf blower with an adjustable air blast that can reach 190 mph. You can use it to clear dead leaves in the fall, but the BlastBoss is designed for both outdoor and indoor use alongside […]

item.title: I tested this super-cheap MP3 player for a month, and I'm surprised to say it quickly became my go-to music source
item.description: The Oakcastle MP300 may be simple, but it does enough that your phone doesn't, to fit into certain set-ups.

item.title: Google dévoile la révolution TurboQuant sans partager le code : un développeur seul le recrée en 7 jours grâce à l’IA
item.description: Un développeur seul, armé de l'IA Claude, a réussi à implémenter la méthode révolutionnaire de Google pour mettre fin à la crise de la RAM. La conséquence : il est désormais possible de faire tourner des modèles d'IA ultra puissants sur un simple ordinateur personnel comme un MacBook Air.

item.title: Save a huge $120 on 32GB of super-fast DDR5-6000 using this special code — while stocks last
item.description: Save $120 on 32GB of super-fast DDR5-6000 RAM using this code at Newegg — at under $380 it's a modern memory bargain.

item.title: Proton adds a secure video conferencing service called Meet to its toolbox
item.description: We’ve written about the Swiss company Proton’s moves to take on Google and Microsoft with an expanding variety of privacy-focused internet services, and the company is announcing yet another new tool today. Proton Meet, as the name suggests, is a video-calling service that sounds comparable to Zoom, Microsoft Teams and, naturally, Google Meet. As with everything Proton does, Meet is end-to-end encrypted, but the company is taking extra steps towards security and anonymity here. You don’t need a Proton account to join a Meet call, which should help service gain traction — you can use Proton and...

item.title: Le BMW iX3 devient (beaucoup) moins cher avec cette nouvelle version : pourquoi elle reste tout à fait recommandable
item.description: Le BMW iX3 vient de recevoir une version plus abordable. Doté d'un seul moteur et d'une batterie (un peu) plus petite, le SUV électrique devient moins cher tout en proposant encore 635 km d'autonomie et une recharge très rapide.

item.title: Trump Posts Concept Art of His Presidential Library, and It’s AI Slop
item.description: Trump likes AI, but this video generator was especially bad at rendering text.

item.title: Ce TV 4K QLED Philips avec Ambilight offre une super immersion sans dépasser les 400 €
item.description: Si vous souhaitez profiter des effets bluffants de l’Ambilight, d'images bien nettes et de technologies d'optimisation gaming sans vous ruiner, alors le TV QLED 4K Philips 50PUS8400/12 devrait vous convenir. Actuellement, Ubaldi l'affiche à 358 euros au lieu de 499 euros.

item.title: The cheap box that adds Freely's free streaming channels to any TV is back in stock — but don't be surprised if it sells out again
item.description: Manhattan TV's Freely streaming box is back in stock at selected UK retailers, but it's likely to sell out again

item.title: 'This is horrific': GitHub kills Copilot pull-request ads after user backlash
item.description: Developers were (understandably) furious with Copilot and other ads appearing in their pull requests – now GitHub has reversed its decision.

item.title: The best deals in Home Depots Spring Sale — score free power tools from Ryobi, DeWalt, and Milwaukee
item.description: Is Home Depot having a spring sale? Kind of. We found deals on cordless tools and lawn mowers, plus bedding, decor, rugs, and more.

item.title: ‘Fallout’ Season 2 Was a Hit Despite That Unsatisfying Release Strategy Change
item.description: A third season is already on the way for Prime Video's post-apocalyptic video game adaptation starring Ella Purnell and Walton Goggins.

item.title: Between Jobs
item.description: This is part of our package about Apple's 50th anniversary, read more here. It's a famous story on its way to becoming legendary: Apple cofounder Steve Jobs was pushed out of Apple in 1985, spent more than a decade in the wilderness, and then returned to Apple in 1997 to save it from bankruptcy and […]

item.title: Belkin’s battery-equipped Switch 2 case is more than 35 percent off right now
item.description: Belkin makes some of the best zip-up cases for the Nintendo Switch 2. Full stop. The company’s aptly titled Charging Case, which includes a 10,000mAh battery to keep your console charged while it’s protected, is particularly novel, although tough to justify at its usual asking price of $69.99. How about for around $45 instead? Now […]

item.title: The Trump administration is paying this company $1 billion to quit building wind farms. Experts question the arrangement’s legality
item.description: The government plans to pay TotalEnergies nearly $1 billion to pull out of offshore wind and focus on fossil fuels. But it can’t legally use taxpayer money without approval from Congress. After failing to stop multiple offshore wind projects from moving forward on the East Coast, the Trump administration is trying a new tactic: paying companies not to build wind farms....

item.title: AI didn’t break marketing. It exposed what wasn’t working.
item.description: As AI reshapes how customers discover brands, leaders must rethink what content deserves attention and what doesn’t.

item.title: WhatsApp corrige enfin son plus grand défaut face à Messenger et Telegram
item.description: WhatsApp va enfin vous permettre de voir en un coup d'œil quels sont vos contacts en ligne. Une fonctionnalité qui lui manquait cruellement face à la concurrence.

item.title: I tried Samsung's all new earbuds therapy app for travel sickness — and it might actually work
item.description: Samsung has unveiled a motion sickness app called Hearapy, so I gave it a spin — and it's not half bad, provided you use the Buds 4 Pro

item.title: Red alert: Apples brand-new AirPods Max 2 are $20 off for Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon has the new Apple AirPods Max 2 marked down to $529 (normally $549) as of March 26, just one day after preorders opened.

item.title: SpaceX loses contact with one of its Starlink satellites
item.description: SpaceX has lost contact with Starlink satellite 34343 after it suffered an unspecified anomaly on March 29 while it was in orbit, the company has announced on X. The event happened while the satellite was approximately 348 miles above our planet. Since that is a relatively low altitude, SpaceX’s analysis showed that the remains of the satellite pose no risk to the International Space Station or the upcoming launch of the Artemis II mission. It also won’t affect the company’s Transporter-16 mission, which launched with small satellites from its clients on March 30. In its statement, SpaceX also...

item.title: 50+ home deals from Amazons Big Spring Sale — cooling sheets, air purifiers, and robot vacuums on sale
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale has some great home deals. Save 60% on Shark robot vacuums and 21% on cooling bed sheets.

item.title: How to watch Brazil vs. Croatia online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Brazil vs. Croatia in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: Airbnb now lets you book a ride to your accommodation
item.description: Airbnb will now let you book private car pickups, mirroring competitors like Expedia, Tripadvisor-owned Viator, and Booking.com.

item.title: How to watch USA vs. Portugal online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream USA vs. Portugal in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: I turned on Location in ChatGPT — and it changed how I searched
item.description: Enabling location services in ChatGPT offers context-aware suggestions for real life
